description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a steep gable roof and dormer windows on the upper floor. The front facade features a covered porch area with a blue outdoor sofa and a driveway leading to a garage. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and landscaped with several tall coniferous trees at the corners and along the sides. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and rear, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard is grassy and private, bordered by the fence and trees, while the side views reveal the sloped roof and additional windows. The overall design is reminiscent of American Craftsman or Colonial Revival styles, with a focus on symmetry and functional outdoor space.
description: A two-story suburban house with a steep gable roof, dormer windows, a covered porch, and a fenced yard landscaped with tall trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with blue sofa, garage, driveway, and two dormer windows above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sloped roof, side windows, tall trees, and the wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, the fenced backyard, and the symmetrical arrangement of trees and greenery.
description_view_3: Right side view with visible roof slope, side windows, and the continuation of the wooden fence and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, single main door, blue outdoor sofa, and no columns or elaborate decorative elements.
